SeasonType.description: The type of season that this team corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The NFL regular season for which these totals apply

PointsAllowed.description: Total points allowed by the team during the season

TouchdownsScored.description: Total defensive and special teams touchdowns scored by the team in the season

SoloTackles.description: Total defensive solo (unassisted) tackles by the team in the season

AssistedTackles.description: Total defensive assisted tackles by the team in the season

Sacks.description: Total defensive sacks by the team in the season

SackYards.description: Total defensive sack yards by the team in the season

PassesDefended.description: Total passes defended by the team in the season

FumblesForced.description: Total fumbles forced on defense by the team in the season

FumblesRecovered.description: Total defensive fumble recoveries by the team in the season

FumbleReturnYards.description: Total fumble return yards by the team in the season

FumbleReturnTouchdowns.description: Total fumble return touchdowns by the team in the season

Interceptions.description: Total defensive interceptions by the team in the season

InterceptionReturnYards.description: Total defensive interception return yards by the team in the season

InterceptionReturnTouchdowns.description: Total defensive interception return touchdowns by the team in the season

BlockedKicks.description: Total blocked kicks by the team in the season. Note: BlockedKicks include Field Goals and Punts but NOT Extra Points

Safeties.description: Total defensive safeties scored by the team in the season

PuntReturns.description: Total punt returns by the team in the season

PuntReturnYards.description: Total punt return yards by the team in the season

PuntReturnTouchdowns.description: Total punt return touchdowns by the team in the season

PuntReturnLong.description: The longest punt return by the team in the season

KickReturns.description: Total kickoff returns by the team in the season

KickReturnYards.description: Total kickoff return yards by the team in the season

KickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total kickoff return touchdowns by the team in the season

KickReturnLong.description: Longest kick return by the team in the season

BlockedKickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total blocked kick recovery return touchdowns for the team in the season

FieldGoalReturnTouchdowns.description: Total field goal return touchdowns by the team in the season. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

FantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the season. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

QuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing quarterbacks by the team in the season

RunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total fantasy points allowed to opposing running backs by the team in the season

WideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing wide receivers

TightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing tight ends by the team in the season

KickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opponent kickers by the team in the season

Games.description: The total number of games played by the team in the season

BlockedKickReturnYards.description: Total blocked kick recovery return yards for the team in the season

FieldGoalReturnYards.description: Total field goal return yards by the team in the season. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

QuarterbackHits.description: Total quarterback hits by the team in the season. Note: This is a defensive stat that includes sacks

TacklesForLoss.description: Total tackles for loss by the team in the season. Note: these are tackles behind the line of scrimmage for loss of yards (including sacks)

DefensiveTouchdowns.description: Total defensive touchdowns scored by the team in the season

SpecialTeamsTouchdowns.description: Total special teams touchdowns scored by the team in the season

FantasyPoints.description: Fantasy points scored based on basic fantasy scoring system by the team in the season

Humidity.description: The humidity percentage at the start of the game

WindSpeed.description: The wind speed at the start of the game (in MPH)

ThirdDownAttempts.description: Total third down attempts against the team in the season

ThirdDownConversions.description: Total third down conversions against the team in the season

FourthDownAttempts.description: Opponent's fourth down attempts against the team in the season

FourthDownConversions.description: Opponent's fourth down conversions against the team in the season

PointsAllowedByDefenseSpecialTeams.description: Total number of points allowed by the team in the season to the opposing offense and special teams. Note: This field excludes points scored by the opponent's defense

AuctionValue.description: Player's dollar value in a $200 salary cap auction draft.

AuctionValuePPR.description: Player's dollar value in a $200 salary cap PPR auction draft.

TwoPointConversionReturns.description: Total successful two point conversion returns by the team in the season

FantasyPointsFanDuel.description: Fantasy points based on FanDuel's scoring system by the team in the season

FantasyPointsDraftKings.description: Fantasy points based on DraftKings' scoring system by the team in the season

OffensiveYardsAllowed.description: Offensive yards allowed by the team's defense in the season

PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO for use when combining with player feeds. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

FantasyPointsYahoo.description: Fantasy points based on Yahoo's daily fantasy scoring system by the team in the season

AverageDraftPosition.description: The average draft position of the team's fantasy defense (DST) in re-draft leagues

AverageDraftPositionPPR.description: The average draft position of the team (DST) in Points Per Reception (PPR) leagues

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

FanDuelFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the season. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

FanDuelQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing quarterbacks in the season

FanDuelRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing running backs in the season

FanDuelWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing wide receivers in the season

FanDuelTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing tight ends in the season

FanDuelKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing kickers in the season

DraftKingsFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the season. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

DraftKingsQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowe.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent quarterbacks in the season

DraftKingsRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowe.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent running backs in the season

DraftKingsWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllow.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent wide receivers in the season

DraftKingsTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent tight ends in the season

DraftKingsKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent kickers in the season

YahooFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players by the team in the season. Note: Offensive players include: QB, RB, WR, & TE

YahooQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing quarterbacks by the team in the season

YahooRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing running backs by the team in the season

YahooWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing wide receivers by the team in the season

YahooTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing tight ends by the team in the season

YahooKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing kickers by the team in the season

FantasyPointsFantasyDraft.description: Fantasy points based on FanDraft's scoring system by the team in the season

FantasyDraftFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the season. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

FantasyDraftQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllo.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing quarterbacks in the season

FantasyDraftRunningbackFantasyPointsAllo.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing running backs in the season

FantasyDraftWideReceiverFantasyPointsAll.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing wide receivers in the season

FantasyDraftTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing tight ends in the season

FantasyDraftKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing kickers in the season

ScoringDetails.description: The details of the scoring plays this team DST recorded in the season

AverageDraftPositionDynasty.description: The average draft position of this team (DST) in dynasty drafts leagues

AverageDraftPosition2QB.description: The average draft position of the team (DST) in 2 Quarterback leagues
